converter_notes: cw 650 (Nilay): developer flagged 'Türk Alman Üniversitesi' as not-set, but it IS set on Chatwoot (custom attribute university='Türk Alman Üniversitesi') and in DB (university_id resolves to 'Türk Alman Üniversitesi'). Not an error — NOT flagged.

cw 1138 (Farhan): developer flagged university not written for widget 'Üniversitem: Bahcesehir university'. Bahçeşehir is multi-campus in DB (Kuzey/Çırağan/Tıp) with no plain 'Bahçeşehir Üniversitesi' list value, and the lead stated no campus; current outcome bilinmiyor-kampus is a defensible withhold, not a concrete miss. NOT flagged as attr_wrong (no legal single correct_value).

cw 1067 (Mine Koşun): developer also flagged 'yerlesti' as wrongly added. TagAssigner did add it, but it was manually removed before this snapshot, so it is absent from the final end-state and cannot be graded as label_wrong_applied (would be a no-op). Captured here instead. The LLM-raw proposal still shows the erroneous 'yerlesti'.

Sıla: two conversations exist — cw 652 'Sıla' (labels: hizmet-veremiyoruz) and cw 707 'sıla' (labels: 3-sinif, info-check, veli). The 'veli wrongly added' complaint maps unambiguously to cw 707, the only one carrying veli.
